channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Fasting may rewire gut and brain to aid weight loss  Qazinform
  3. Time-Restricted Eating Improves Gut Health and Cardiometabolic Markers: Study  Medical Dialogues
  4. Intermittent fasting triggers surprising changes in the brain boosting memory and mental sharpness: Study  TheHealthSite

item.title: Neuroscientist reveals the one 'superfood' he eats every single day to slow down ageing - The Mirror
item.description:
1. Neuroscientist reveals the one 'superfood' he eats every single day to slow down ageing  The Mirror
  2. Blueberries vs Avocados: Which Food Gets More Anti-Aging Buzz?  Yahoo
  3. Nueroscientist names one 'superfood' he tries to eat daily for healthy ageing  North Wales Live
  4. Blueberries and strawberries may help slow ageing  Female First
